title: INERRA Card Holders - Clear Cardettes with Spike for Flower Bouquets Message Cards (Pack of 10)
features: INERRA Flower bouquet card holder spike.
Clear card holders ideal for holding greeting cards or message cards
Long spike suitable for placing into flower bouquets. Can also be inserted into floral foam arrangements.
Also known as cardettes. 22.5cm length. Spike width 4mm. Card holder width 3cm.
Available from packs of 10 up to packs of 200
description: Product description Clear cardettes available in a variety of pack size options Legal Disclaimer Sharp spike handle with care. Keep out of reach of children.
